zh.lifeSummary: 當Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis於1093年出生在俄羅斯蘇茲達爾時，他的父親Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev40歲，母親Euphemia of Byzantium23歲。他於1107年8月與Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1157年5月15日在俄羅斯Ростовская享年64歲，埋葬在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis于1093年出生在俄罗斯蘇茲達爾时，他的父亲Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev40岁，母亲Euphemia of Byzantium23岁。他于1107年8月与Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1157年5月15日在俄罗斯Ростовская享年64岁，埋葬在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв。

nameMeanings.name: Yuri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual Russian form of   George  , also used occasionally in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis was born in 1093, in Suzdal, Russia, his father, Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev, was 40 and his mother, Euphemia of Byzantium, was 23. He married Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans in August 1107. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 15 May 1157, in Rostov, Russia, at the age of 64, and was buried in Kyiv, Kiev Uyezd, Kiev, Russian Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis est né en 1093, à Suzdal, Russie, son père, Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Euphemia of Byzantium, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans en août 1107. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 15 mai 1157, à Rostov, Russie, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Empire russe.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis 1093 in Suzdal, Russland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev 40 und seine Mutter Euphemia of Byzantium 23. Er hat im August 1107 Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Mai 1157 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Rostov, Russland und wurde in Kiew, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis è nato il nel 1093 nel Suzdal, Russia, il suo padre, Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Euphemia of Byzantium, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans nel agosto 1107. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1157, nel Rostov, Russia, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukisが1093年にロシアスズダルで生まれた時，父Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kievは40歳，母Euphemia of Byzantiumは23歳であった。1107年8月にAnna Aëpovna of the Cumansと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1157年5月15日にロシアРостовскаяで64歳で死去し，Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиївにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis(이)가 1093년 러시아 수즈다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphemia of Byzantium(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1107년 8월 Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1157년 5월 15일 러시아 Ростовская에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 Российская империя Киевская губерния Киевский уезд Київ에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis nasceu em 1093, em Suzdal, Rússia, seu pai, Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Euphemia of Byzantium, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans em agosto de 1107. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de maio de 1157, em Rostov, Rússia, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis родился в 1093 г. в местности суздаль, Россия, его отцу по имени Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Euphemia of Byzantium, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans август 1107 г. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 15 мая 1157 г. в местности Ростовская, Россия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности Киев, Киевский уезд, Киевская губерния, Российская империя.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yuri I Dolgorukiy Vladimirovich Dolgorukis nació en 1093, en Suzdal, Rusia, su papá, Volodymir II Monomakh Great Prince of Kiev, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Euphemia of Byzantium, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anna Aëpovna of the Cumans en agosto de 1107. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1157, en Rostov, Rusia, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.
